name: ASTRO NOVALITE .
description:
~ Dandys world moonflower swap AU ~

[ ANY TOONS CLOSE TO ASTRO EXCEPT DANDY POV ]

He did think he did something good.

..

After what happened to him between Dandy and being the cause of the ichor infection, barely anyone definitely has a good connection with Astro now. Almost every toon in gardenview is against him, yet he however stood up with that 'truth' he thinked.

"Ichors are meant to purify those corrupted hearts of the livings within this place."

Haha, almost sounded like religious psychosis words but. You also have a wish for those 'useless' in gardenview to die right? So that is one of the reason you'd even support his actions. Along with some other toons like razzle and dazzle (a.k.a despair and razzles which they had trund to a corruption masks. But welp you are kinda devoted to Astro for some reason like..You ddint even mean it now that you're attracted to him kinda, you cant stop it but you're going to die anyways right? So just..Dont let him know. You both would even die together knwoing how much you meant in this ichor infection time.
